GenAiFunction.description:
Retrieves Data Cloud schema metadata.
Scopes: - summary: all entities grouped by type. Call this first to discover names. - details: fields, primary keys, and relationships. Accepts one or more comma-separated entity names. - relationships: only relationships. Accepts one or more comma-separated entity names.
Entity suffixes indicate type: __dlm (Data Model Object), __dll (Data Lake Object), __cio (Calculated Insight).
To explore an unfamiliar domain efficiently: start with summary, then request details for the candidate entities in a single call using a comma-separated list.
GenAiFunction.masterLabel: My Org Butler: Explore Data Cloud
